profile.name: Ecclesiates Natarios Sihombing
profile.headline: CS - SE Student & HIMTI Activist
about: I am a Computer Science student at BINUS University specializing in Software Engineering.
I work as a HIMTI Responsi Activist, helping fellow students learn the fundamental in college.

research.narrative: I am focused on understanding systems architecture, programming paradigms, and structural project design to build robust software systems.

focus.name: Software Engineering
focus.description: Designing, developing, testing, and maintaining clean and robust software systems.

focus.name: Full Stack Developer
focus.description: Building responsive web applications, interactive frontends, and reliable backend APIs.

focus.name: Game Development
focus.description: Exploring game engines, mechanics, physics, and scripting workflows (e.g. GDScript in Godot).

focus.name: Passionate Projects
focus.description: Creating tools, bots, and fun open-source applications that solve real needs (e.g., Discord bots).

projects.name: portofolio

footer: Building thoughtful systems and sharing what works.
